channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Bulletproofing LLM Structured Output in Python: Healing Retries, Cost Caps, and Drift Detection (Runnable Code)
item.description: I shipped a structured-output endpoint to production in March. The schema was clean, JSON mode was on, the model was GPT-4.1, the eval suite was green. Three weeks in, the on-call channel lit up...

item.description: CDP Bridge MCP is a bridge service that connects MCP clients to real browser sessions. Through its companion Chromium extension, model clients can access browser pages, list tabs, scan page...

item.title: Tokenmaxxing: Codex + Claude Code Operator Stack 2026
item.description: In May 2026, four independent surfaces named the same pattern in the same news cycle. YC Lightcone called it tokenmaxxing — one founder plus an agent harness doing the work of four hundred...

item.title: String Polyfills and Common Interview Methods in JavaScript
item.description: Understanding how string methods work under the hood — and building them yourself. Here's something that changed how I think about JavaScript: anyone can use .trim() or .includes(). You call the...

item.title: My MCP Server Got Rate-Limited After Auth. Here's the 5-Line Fix.
item.description: A Sentry MCP user reported it on March 18: "all API calls being rate-limited within a few minutes of auth." The OAuth handshake works fine. It's the calls after auth that quietly burn the budget,...

item.title: Monitoring: From Black Box to Glass Box
item.description: You've built your AI agent. You've configured the tools, crafted a thoughtful system prompt, and deployed it to your users. Job done, right? Not quite. Once your agent is live, a whole new set of...

item.title: Array Flatten in JavaScript
item.description: Turning messy nested arrays into clean, flat ones — and understanding why it matters. At some point, you'll run into an array that looks like this: const data = [1, [2, 3], [4, [5, 6]], 7]; Arrays...

item.title: ECET AI Study Buddy using Gemma 4 – My First Local AI Project
item.description: 🚀 Introduction I built a simple AI Study Buddy for ECET preparation using Gemma 4. The goal of this project is to help students practice multiple-choice questions, get instant answers, and learn...

item.title: Array Methods You Must Know
item.description: The six methods that turn JavaScript arrays from basic lists into powerful tools. When I first learned arrays, I thought I was done. Create an array, access elements by index, loop through them...

item.title: Voice AI in India is hard. Wispr Flow is betting on it anyway.
item.description: Wispr Flow says growth accelerated in India after its Hinglish rollout, even as voice AI products continue to face challenges.

item.title: So you’ve heard these AI terms and nodded along; let’s fix that
item.description: The rise of AI has brought an avalanche of new terms and slang. Here is a glossary with definitions of some of the most important words and phrases you might encounter.

item.title: "OncoAgent: A Dual-Tier Multi-Agent Framework for Privacy-Preserving Oncology Clinical Decision Support"

item.description: If you’re tired of running your vacuum multiple times just to get the dirt and debris out of the carpets in your living room, Dyson’s 360 Vis Nav is worth a look. It’s one of the more powerful...

item.title: Nvidia has already committed $40B to equity AI deals this year
item.description: Nvidia continues to be a big investor in the AI ecosystem.

item.title: These great digital gifts will arrive just in time for Mother’s Day
item.description: And just like that, Mother’s Day is tomorrow, May 10th, which is too soon for most online purchases to arrive in time. That said, you aren’t alone if you waited too long to pick up a gift this...

item.title: Let it snow
item.description: Water gets all the credit. When gaming companies want to show off new graphics technology, things tend to get wet; splashing waves that are only possible with the latest physics engine, or puddles...

item.title: Hackable Robot Lawn Mower Unlocks a New Nightmare
item.description: Plus: Meta officially kills encrypted Instagram DMs, the Trump administration targets “violent left wing extremists,” leaked documents reveal Russia's school for elite hackers, and more.

item.title: cPanel, WHM Release Fixes for Three New Vulnerabilities — Patch Now
item.description: cPanel has released updates to address three vulnerabilities in cPanel and Web Host Manager (WHM) that could be exploited to achieve privilege escalation, code execution, and denial-of-service....

item.title: Musk v. Altman week 2: OpenAI fires back, and Shivon Zilis reveals that Musk tried to poach Sam Altman
item.description: In the second week of the landmark trial between Elon Musk and OpenAI, Musk’s motivations for bringing the suit were under scrutiny. Last week, Musk took the stand, alleging that OpenAI CEO Sam...

item.title: Laid-off Oracle workers tried to negotiate better severance. Oracle said no.
item.description: Some found out they didn't qualify for WARN Act protections like two-months notice because the company had classified them as remote workers.

item.title: Friday Squid Blogging: Giant Squid Live in the Waters of Western Australia
item.description: Evidence of them has been found by analyzing DNA in the seawater. As usual, you can also use this squid post to talk about the security stories in the news that I haven’t covered. Blog moderation...

item.title: Asus chases Elgato with its own secondary touchscreen display
item.description: Asus's latest gaming monitor is a little smaller than usual. The ROG Strix XG129C, announced on Friday, is a 12.3-inch touchscreen IPS display that's intended to be a sidekick for a larger main...

item.title: Amazon is adding a vertical video feed to Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video is joining Netflix and Disney Plus in adding a vertical feed of videos to its streaming app. The new "Clips" feed will offer a stream of short-form videos from shows and movies,...

item.title: Intel’s comeback story is even wilder than it seems
item.description: Intel's stock has risen a stunning 490% over the past year, a bet by Wall Street that may be running well ahead of the company's actual turnaround.

item.title: Here is Yarbo’s promise to fix the robot mower that ran me over
item.description: Yesterday, I told you how a hacker ran me over with a robot lawn mower. We explained how thousands of these bladed Chinese robots, made by Yarbo, could be hijacked with ease - exposing people's...

item.title: All the latest updates on AI data centers
item.description: Massive new data centers are the physical foundation for tech companies’ hopes and dreams for AI. But the rush to expand warehouses full of energy-hungry servers has also kicked up fights across...

item.title: Chaos erupts as cyberattack disrupts learning platform Canvas amid finals
item.description: Across the country, schools and colleges postpone year-end tests.
